MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Geary Courtyard Associates and there being no appearance by Defendant, Brenda Genao the case removed from Settlement Conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
